payload.project_name: Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown Select Bus Service
payload.description: Proposed Bx6 SBS along the South Bronx corridor between Washington Heights/Riverside Dr W and Hunts Point/Food Center Dr, with dedicated bus lanes, off-board fare collection, all-door boarding, and signal priority.

payload.limits: Washington Heights/Riverside Dr W to Hunts Point/Food Center Dr
payload.description: The Bx6 South Bronx corridor runs from Washington Heights in Manhattan west to Hunts Point in the Bronx, primarily along 161st Street, connecting to multiple subway lines and bus routes.
Bx6 SBS stops only at SBS stops along the South Bronx corridor

tool_args.label: Initial Plan: Two-Way Bus Tunnel 161st St

payload.description: Initial plan for a two-way bus tunnel under 161st Street at Sheridan Ave, Sherman Ave, and Morris Ave to improve bus speeds, with straightforward design for drivers but potential westbound delays at Sheridan Ave

payload.description: Final proposal for a one-way bus tunnel under 161st Street, beneficial for 25,000 daily bus riders with no significant traffic impacts, addressing boarding issues in front of courts
